description: Send durable mail to sessions selected by selector.

from.description: Sender session id. Defaults to HELIOY_SESSION_ID when set; otherwise smd records the controller sender.

to.description:
Recipient selector used for matching sessions.

Grammar:
  all
  <uuid>
  id:<uuid>
  role:<name>
  namespace:<slug>
  dir:<path>
  label:<key>=<value>
  label:<key> in (v1, v2)
Examples:
  all
  019e44f9-...
  role:engineer
  namespace:default
  dir:/tmp/project
  label:app=nginx
  "label:app in (web, api)"

name: mail_send
